fixtures.purpose: Valid branded XLSX report package with configured tokens, metadata, footer, sheet name, tab color, and table styling.
Valid XLSX package using explicit fallback tokens when no brand config is supplied.
Valid XLSX package with wide data, freeze panes, bounded column widths, and brand styling.
Rejects HTML or CSV bytes renamed as an XLSX artifact.
Rejects XLSX packages missing workbook style or worksheet parts.
Rejects legacy or off-token colors in workbook styles.
Rejects remote URLs or external relationships inside the XLSX package.
